---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for the extension
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it.
(e.g. "I find it frustrating when…" or "I can't currently see…")

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered, and why you prefer the
proposed solution over them.

## Scope check

Before proposing, please read [ROADMAP.md](../../ROADMAP.md) to check whether
the feature is already planned, or conflicts with a positioning decision (e.g.
we deliberately do NOT add notifications/webhooks or a teams-monitor breadth).

- [ ] I have read ROADMAP.md and the feature is not already planned/out-of-scope.

## Additional context

Mockups, screenshots, links to similar tools, or any other context that helps
illustrate the request.
